◎简　　介  

　　Comedy special features eulogies for the year 2020 with a line-up of all-women comedians discussing everything from casual sex to beige Band-Aids and everything in between that we've "lost" in 2020.

◎获奖情况  

　　第73届美国编剧工会奖(2021)
　　电视奖 喜剧/综艺类特别集(提名)
